info.name: ICRCS API — Full Collection
info.description:
Integrated Civil Registration and Citizenship System
Base URL: http://localhost:8080/api (context-path /api)

== Citizen flow ==
1. Register → preAuthToken
2. Verify-OTP ({{bearer_token_0gog}}) → token
3. Stage1 domestic/foreign/migrant → subjectId
   Migrant: also submit travel-history
   Naturalization: submit naturalization block
4. Stage2 → Stage3 → Stage4 → Stage5 → Stage6 → Stage7(GET) → Upload files → Stage8 → Stage9

== Officer flow ==
1. Login (*.go.tz email) → officerToken
2. POST /v1/officer/registration/stage1/migrant → subjectId
3. travel-history → stage2 → stage3 → stage4 → stage5 → stage6 → stage7 → files → stage8 → stage9

Auto-set variables: token, preAuthToken, officerToken, subjectId, profileId

request.description: PUBLIC. Returns preAuthToken (use as Bearer for Verify-OTP) and profileId.
Requires Bearer {{preAuthToken}}. Returns accessToken + refreshToken.
PUBLIC. identifier = email or phone number.
PUBLIC. Email must end in .go.tz — proxied to User Management API. Token saved as {{officerToken}}.
Unlocks account after 5 failed login attempts.
Rate-limited: 30 requests/5 min.

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG or PNG). Max 300 KB.

request.description: External Lookup Service. Returns streets/mtaa for a given ward ID.

item.name: Street Info (full hierarchy by street ID)

request.description: Returns street→ward→district→region→country for a given streetId.
Use citizenshipTypeId in Stage 1 requests.
Returns document types grouped: applicant / father / mother.
Use attachmentTypeId in Stage 8. Mandatory: BIRTH_CERTIFICATE, FATHER_BIRTH_CERT, MOTHER_BIRTH_CERT, WEO_VEO_LETTER.

item.name: Citizen Registration

request.description: placeOfBirthStreetId from /v1/lookup/streets/{wardId}. Returns subjectId.

request.description:
registrationType: REFUGEE | MIGRANT | ASYLUM_SEEKER | ILLEGAL_MIGRANT | LEGAL_MIGRANT
After this: submit Travel History before Stage 2.
Only required when citizenshipTypeId in Stage 1 = NATURALIZATION type.

item.name: Travel History (migrant only — after Stage 1 migrant, before Stage 2)

request.description: hasDocument=false → undocumented migrant, all document fields become optional.

father, mother, guardian — all optional but at least one should be provided.

request.description: IMPORTANT: relatives array requires at least 2 entries. hasChildren=false → children=[]. isMarried=false → spouses=[].
Read-only. No data saved. Form is printed and signed offline.

formdata.description: Max 300 KB. Allowed: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf.

request.description: Returns { fileUrl, fileSizeBytes, fileHash, mimeType, originalFilename }. Use fileUrl in Stage 8.
Upload files first via POST /v1/files/upload then reference their fileUrl here. Mandatory: BIRTH_CERTIFICATE, FATHER_BIRTH_CERT, MOTHER_BIRTH_CERT, WEO_VEO_LETTER.
Returns complete ReviewResponse for citizen to review before declaring.
Returns application/pdf binary.
confirmed=true REQUIRED. Creates CaseAssignment for management workflow (status: PENDING_ENROLLMENT).
PUBLIC — no auth. Returns status, finalStatus, documentType.
PUBLIC. Full ReviewResponse after Stage 9 declared.
PUBLIC. PDF binary of completed registration form.

item.description:
All endpoints require Bearer {{token}}.
Flow: Stage1 → [Naturalization] → [TravelHistory if migrant] → Stage2 → Stage3 → Stage4 → Stage5 → Stage6 → Stage7(GET) → Upload files → Stage8 → Stage9

item.name: Officer Registration

request.description: Returns { userId, username, stationId }.

query.description: PENDING | PENDING_ENROLLMENT | DECLARED | APPROVED | REJECTED | ESCALATED
mine = by this officer | station = all at this station

request.description: Returns fileUrl — use in Step 10.
confirmed must be true. Creates CaseAssignment (PENDING_ENROLLMENT) in management workflow.
Returns RegistrationStatusResponse: status, finalStatus, documentType.

item.description:
Officer-driven flow for migrants / refugees / asylum seekers.
All endpoints require Bearer {{officerToken}}.
Flow: Stage1 migrant → travel-history → stage2 → stage3 → stage4 → stage5 → stage6 → stage7(GET) → upload files → stage8 → stage9

formdata.description: Max 300 KB. Allowed MIME: image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf.

request.description: Returns { fileUrl, fileSizeBytes, fileHash, mimeType, originalFilename }.
PUBLIC — no auth. Returns file binary. Path traversal blocked.
PUBLIC. Alternative URL style.
PUBLIC. Serves static avatars from classpath.
Sets status to APPROVED and activates person account. No auth required.
Sets status to PENDING_ENROLLMENT. Useful for testing management biometric enrollment flow.
PUBLIC.
